title: God tool
description: God tool is a multitool with INSANE attack speed and damage, durability, enchantability etc etc
body: # GOD TOOL God tool is a multitool with **INSANE** attack speed and damage, durability, enchantability etc etc, but its **really HARD to get in survival/hardcore** ## Comparison Chart | Mob | Other | Hits | | -------- | -------- | -------- | | end dragon | no crystals | 1 shot | | end dragon | with crystals | 2 shots | | warden | . | 2 shots | | Player | Full enchanted netherite armor | 1 shot | | Wither | . | 1 shot | | iron golem | . | 1 shot | ## Crafting recepie Gets craftted with a dragon egg, 2 piglin heads, chainmail chestplate, 2 netherite blocks, a blaze rod and 2 silence armor trims i know very hard ---
